collector.issue.permission.description: The current auth context cannot read this surface.
collector.issue.permission.impact: Coverage is incomplete and the audit cannot confirm this control.
collector.issue.permission.remediation: Grant the missing read permission or rerun with a deeper profile.

collector.issue.service.description: The target service surface is unavailable or not enabled.
collector.issue.service.impact: Coverage is partial until the service becomes available.
collector.issue.service.remediation: Validate tenant service state and rerun the affected collector.

collector.issue.collector.description: The collector reported an operational issue.
collector.issue.collector.impact: Audit evidence for this surface may be incomplete or stale.
collector.issue.collector.remediation: Review collector diagnostics and rerun after fixing the failure.

sharepoint.broad_link.description: A site exposes broad sharing through organization-wide or anonymous links.
sharepoint.broad_link.impact: Data can be exposed beyond the intended audience.
sharepoint.broad_link.remediation: Disable broad sharing links or reduce sharing capability.
sharepoint.broad_link.expected_value: Broad links are disabled or tightly scoped

app_consent.high_privilege.description: An enterprise application has risky delegated scopes or weak ownership.
app_consent.high_privilege.impact: Compromised or abandoned app consent can expose tenant data broadly.
app_consent.high_privilege.remediation: Review app consent, remove unused grants, and assign responsible owners.
app_consent.high_privilege.expected_value: Only approved apps keep high-risk scopes and every app has owners
